titleStmt.title: Letter from Stopford & Turner to T. Greany, 7 January 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Stopford and Turner

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p:
Letter indicating the pension arrangements for Murhill for the last quarter.
This is a letter from the extensive Bantry Estate Collection, held in the Boole Library of University College Cork. The collection, which covers a period of 300 years, contains the formal records regarding the legal, financial and general administration of this large house and estate in County Cork.

msIdentifier.repository: UCC Library Special Collections and Archives

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
7th Janry. 1916 T. Greany Esq.,
Estate Office,
Muckross. Dear Mr Greany:- Murhill's Pension Enclosed we send Mr Lecky's cheque our
favour for £3. 18. 0 endorsed payable to you
being in discharge of Murhill's pension for
quarter ended 25th ulto, will you please let
us have his receipt. With all good wishes to you for the New
Year Yours very truly, (SGD) STOPFORD & TURNER. E. F.
